chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No. S- 25 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 05-05-2023 Mr. Ghulam Hussain Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Sadam Hussain Laghari, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Imran Mobeen, Assistant P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant Crl. Transfer Application; hence, the same stands dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to expedite the trial as per order passed by this Court on 13.05.2022 in Crl. Misc. Application No.S-208 of 2020. JUDGE Ahmad
